In the [[Light and Darkness War]] during the [[New Sith Wars]], a '''battle''' occurred at the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Taanab/Legends|Taanab]] that saw the [[Brotherhood of Darkness/Legends|Brotherhood of Darkness]] defeat the [[Army of Light/Legends|Army of Light]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Darth Bane: Path of Destruction]]'' {{Ab|Darth Bane: Path of Destruction (audiobook)}} {{1stm|in book}}
